name: The Range Clubhouse & Lounge
about: The Range Clubhouse & Lounge is Williston's premier year-round indoor golf and shooting venue, featuring a relaxed atmosphere and top-tier service. The facility houses 3 state-of-the-art golf simulators and 2 shooting simulators, catering to both casual players and serious enthusiasts. Additionally, it offers a full-service lounge with a bar, premium gear shopping, and lessons, making it a comprehensive entertainment and training destination. Membership options are available during winter months, providing packages for 5 or 10 hours of simulator time. The venue is suitable for various occasions, from solo practice to group events and birthday parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium gear shopping and club fitting services
Available for leagues and private events
Winter membership options for frequent players

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with signature cocktails, separate lounge area

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent equipment available at the venue. They offer golf necessities and club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and drink options with a full bar serving signature cocktails. External food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, but bookings are available until 10:00pm.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue requires all customers to be 21+ with ID, making it strictly adults-only.
